title: taraxacum pilicatum
intro: Taraxacum pilicatum, also known as the woolly dandelion or woolly hawk's beard, is a plant species in the dandelion genus, characterized by its distinctive hairy stems and leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to treat digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Taraxacum pilicatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
